name: Exempt Organization Communication Exclusion

eligibility.description: Must be an organization described in section 501(c) and exempt under 501(a) communicating specifically to its own members.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Expenditures by 501(c) organizations for communicating the organization's views to its members regarding presidential candidates are excluded from the $1,000 expenditure limit.
